This lesson covers common expressions used in social settings, including answering the phone and social events.
Εμπρός; Hello? (answering)Ναι; Yes? / Hello?Ποιος είναι; Who is it?Ένα λεπτό. One minute.
Χρόνια Πολλά! Happy Birthday/Anniversary! (lit. Many Years)Συγχαρητήρια! Congratulations!Καλή επιτυχία! Good luck!Περαστικά! Get well soon!
Στην υγειά μας! Cheers! (To our health)Γειά μας! Cheers! (Short version)Καλή όρεξη! Bon Appétit!
is the most common wish in Greece. It is used for birthdays, name days, weddings, Christmas, Easter, and almost every national holiday!
